title: Substitute Teachers, Short-Term
description: Teach students on a short-term basis as a temporary replacement for a regular classroom teacher, typically using the regular teacher's lesson plan.

tasks.text: Enforce school and class rules to maintain order in the classroom.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Follow lesson plans designed by absent teachers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Take class attendance and maintain attendance records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Supervise students during activities outside the classroom, such as recess, lunch, and field trips.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach social skills to students, such as communication, conflict resolution, and etiquette.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Tutor or assist students individually or in small groups.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Distribute or collect tests or homework assignments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Distribute teaching materials, such as textbooks, workbooks, papers, and pencils, to students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach a variety of subjects, such as English, mathematics, and social studies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate equipment such as computers or audio-visual aids to supplement presentations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Counsel students with adjustment or academic problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend professional meetings, educational conferences, or teacher training workshops to improve professional competence.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide students with disabilities with assistive devices, supportive technology, or assistance accessing facilities, such as restrooms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize and supervise games or other recreational activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist students with boarding or exiting school buses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
